name: mcphire
description: MCPHire — MCP-first IT job board for Russia. 74,547 active vacancies from 25,501 companies across 1,402 cities. Real-time salary data and semantic job matching for AI agents.

tools.name: search_jobs
tools.description: Search 74,547 active IT jobs from 25,501 Russian companies. Filters: query (free-text), city, category, level (junior|middle|senior|lead), salary_min (RUB/month), skills (array), remote (bool), limit (default 20, max 100).

tools.name: get_job_details
tools.description: Get full job details by ID or slug. Returns Schema.org JobPosting with description, hiring organization, baseSalary, key_skills, validThrough.

tools.name: get_salary_stats
tools.description: Salary percentile analytics by role/level/city. Returns p25/p50/p75/p90 in RUB/month + sample size. Current medians: junior 75K, middle 90K, senior 120K, lead 150K.

tools.name: market_trends
tools.description: Hiring volume trend for a role/city over last 30 or 90 days. Returns daily counts + percent change.

tools.name: apply_to_job
tools.description: Submit application to job with optional cover_letter. Requires authentication via bearer token (email/password login or Telegram OAuth). Rate-limited to 10 applications/hour per user.

tools.name: get_my_applications
tools.description: List current user's submitted applications with status (pending|seen|interviewing|rejected|offered). Requires authentication.
